title: Annual Campus Sustainability Report
content: This report summarizes energy usage, waste diversion, and student-led initiatives for the 2025 academic year. The campus reduced electricity consumption by twelve percent year over year.

title: 图书馆年度总结
content: 本年度图书馆延长了开放时间，并新增了数字资源数据库。师生借阅量较上一年增长约百分之八。
